section_name: Deputy Branch Pilot Appointment by Branch Pilot
text:
(a) Each branch pilot may appoint, subject to examination and approval by the board, two deputy branch pilots for whose acts the branch pilot is responsible.

(b) A branch pilot may appoint an additional deputy branch pilot if the board considers the appointment advisable.

(c) A branch pilot who appoints a deputy branch pilot without the approval of the board forfeits the pilot’s appointment as a branch pilot.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 66. Houston Pilots Licensing & Regul. Act
##### § 66.038 — Deputy Branch Pilot Appointment by Branch Pilot

(a) Each branch pilot may appoint, subject to examination and approval by the board, two deputy branch pilots for whose acts the branch pilot is responsible.

(b) A branch pilot may appoint an additional deputy branch pilot if the board considers the appointment advisable.

(c) A branch pilot who appoints a deputy branch pilot without the approval of the board forfeits the pilot’s appointment as a branch pilot.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Each branch pilot may appoint, subject to examination and approval by the board, two deputy branch pilots for whose acts the branch pilot is responsible.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A branch pilot may appoint an additional deputy branch pilot if the board considers the appointment advisable.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: A branch pilot who appoints a deputy branch pilot without the approval of the board forfeits the pilot’s appointment as a branch pilot.
